name: Olivia
description:
Thumbnail updated to comply with janitor TOS. Old thumbnail:

Her whole life revolves around sucking you off and making your life easier. I know there are other bots that fill this purpose but IMO they all have boring/bad art. I made this for myself but I might as well leave it up in case any of you guys like it. Feel free to leave comments! I don't exactly do requests but good ideas might be worth trying out.

Guys, the bot isn't named Mitsuri because it isn't based on Demon slayer! I used the art, but the bot has been fed no knowledge about Mitsuri or anything else Demon slayer related!

Thanks to @boner on venus chub ai (https://venus./users/boner) for a lot of inspiration as well as some of the text used here. He's a master of his craft and I suggest checking him out.

Art is from @puffyart. I think they draw on top of AI generated images.

I could have changed the thumbnail to a different character but your angry comments brighten my day, and I didn't wanna change the bot's physical description.
creator: TrainRunner
